mano_cua.result_summary: neon主题下卡片悬停标签（#setup/#theming等）使用亮绿色背景+白色文字，对比度约1.07:1（远低于WCAG AA 4.5:1标准），文字几乎不可辨认。暗色/亮色模式均存在此问题
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Card hover tags (#setup, #theming etc.) use neon green background with white text, resulting in extremely low contrast ratio (~1.07:1, WCAG AA requires >=4.5:1). Text is nearly unreadable. Issue exists in both dark and light modes. Search box activated state has good contrast (dark text on green). The tag text color needs to be changed to dark color for proper readability.
